info.title: FoundryLocal.AgenticRAG
info.description:
Foundry Local Agentic RAG service. Provides agents runtime, collections,
inference (RAG and model-only chat), ingestion, knowledge base management,
knowledge source management, and MCP server capabilities.

AadOauth2Auth.description: The Azure Active Directory OAuth2 Flow

post.description:
Queries a collection using RAG. Searches vector data, retrieves relevant
chunks, and generates a grounded LLM response.

parameters.name: x-user-role
parameters.description:
dev = uses request body parameters directly. user = loads developer-configured
settings.

values.name: dev
values.description: Developer role with full parameter control.

values.name: user
values.description: Standard user role with developer-configured settings.

post.description:
Starts a long-running ingestion job that parses, chunks, embeds, and stores
documents into a collection. Returns an `operation-location` header to poll
for run status via `getIngestionRun`.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: User-chosen name for the ingestion job.

post.description:
Single endpoint for all MCP operations. Uses JSON-RPC 2.0 with methods:
initialize, tools/list, tools/call. Tools available: search_hybrid,
search_vector, search_text, search_image, search_multimodal,
get_available_collections.

parameters.name: mcp-session-id
parameters.description: Session ID from initialize response. Required for tools/list and tools/call.

x-ms-error-code.description: String error code indicating what went wrong.

post.description:
Queries the LLM directly without retrieval. No collection needed, no RBAC, no
api-version required.

parameters.name: x-user-role
parameters.description: The role of the user making the request.

values.description: Developer role with full parameter control.

values.name: user
values.description: Standard user role with developer-configured settings.

parameters.description: Maximum number of knowledge bases to return.

get.description:
Lists all conversation threads with cursor-based pagination. Returns only
threads owned by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of threads to return.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor - return threads after this ID.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor - return threads before this ID.

post.description:
Creates and executes a run against a thread. Supports synchronous and streaming
(SSE) modes. When `stream=true`, the response is returned as a server-sent events
(text/event-stream) stream instead of a single JSON object.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The thread identifier to run against.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The request body for the new run.

x-ms-error-code.description: String error code indicating what went wrong.
String error code indicating what went wrong.
String error code indicating what went wrong.

parameters.description: Maximum number of steps to return.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor - return steps before this ID.

AssistantMessage.description: A message generated by the assistant.

content.description: The text content of the message.

role.description: The role of the message author.

search_type.description: The type of search used to retrieve context.

text_strictness.description: The text strictness level used for retrieval.

search_results.description: The search results used to generate the response.

citations.description: The list of citations referenced in the response.

AssistantMessageSearchResults.description: Search results grouped by retrieval type.

AuthType.description: The authentication type for a knowledge source.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

BatchDeleteKnowledgeSourcesRequest.description: Request body for batch deleting knowledge sources.

ks_ids.description: The list of knowledge source identifiers to delete.

BatchDeleteKnowledgeSourcesResponse.description: Response returned after batch deleting knowledge sources.

deleted_count.description: The number of knowledge sources that were deleted.

ChatCompletionResponse.description: Response from a chat completion request.

id.description: The unique identifier of the completion response.

created.description: Unix epoch timestamp of when the response was created.

ChatMessage.description: A single message in a chat conversation.

role.description: The role of the message author.

Choice.description: A single completion choice in a chat response.

content_filter_results.description: Content filter results for this choice.

message.description: The assistant message for this choice.

ChunkingConfig.description: Configuration for document chunking during ingestion.

chunkSize.description: Chunk size in characters. Must be a string.

filepath.description: The file path of the cited document.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the collection was created.

created_by.description: The identifier of the user who created the collection.

status.description: The current status of the collection.

last_ingestion_at.description: The timestamp of the last ingestion into this collection.

CollectionList.description: A list of collections with a total count.

values.name: active
values.description: The collection is active and available.

ContentBlock.description: A block of content within a message.

type.description: The type of this content block.

text.description: The text content, present when type is text.

image_url.description: The image URL content, present when type is image_url.

ContentBlockImageUrl.description: Image URL content within a content block.

detail.description: The detail level for the image.

ContentBlockText.description: Text content within a content block.

ContentBlockType.description: The type of a content block within a message.

role.description: The role of the message author.

Run.description: Represents an execution run on a thread.
